# DNSSettings.DNSSettings

**Device Management Profile**

A dictionary that defines a configuration for an encrypted DNS server.

## Declaration

```swift
object DNSSettings.DNSSettings
```

## Objects

- **DNSSettings.OnDemandRulesElement**: A list of domain strings that determine which DNS queries use the DNS server.

items.description: A list of domain strings that determine which DNS queries use the DNS server.
items.name: DNSSettings.OnDemandRulesElement
